title: revision ledger: trace.attempts + failure-signature normalizer (D1)
action: Per D1 (+Δ1/Δ4/F1 folded in CONTEXT Validating amendments): FREEZE FIRST (test_lib + test_bee_cli + test_claim_race green recorded). Add appendAttempt inside recordVerify (both pass and fail) and blockCell: append {n, at, claim_session, claimed_at (copied from the live claim file when present — Δ1, needed for budget counting), worker, verdict: pass|fail|blocked, failure_signature, note} to trace.attempts (append-only; create when absent). failure_signature: explicit --signature flag on cells verify (thread bee.mjs + command-registry, both copies) else normalizeFailureSignature(output): strip ISO timestamps, absolute paths, hex runs; first line matching /FAIL|Error|refus|denied/i else first non-empty; sha256 -> 12 hex. Export the normalizer. F1: do NOT edit UPDATE_FROZEN_HINTS — trace is already frozen wholesale; add a test asserting a {trace:{...}} patch refuses. Existing rows byte-unchanged. Tests: fail->entry, pass->entry, entries survive capCell, trace-patch refusal, normalizer deterministic under timestamp/path noise. Δ4: verify also runs test_claim_race (shared claim-clearing surface). Regen inside cell: mirror + render_plugin_skill_trees + release_manifest --write/--check.

truths: ledger is append-only — no path rewrites or removes entries
normalizer is deterministic for equal logical failures
existing verify/cap flows byte-compatible when ledger absent
artifacts: ledger test rows green with a deliberate-red proving they bite
prohibitions: no signature computed from unredacted absolute paths

verify: node scripts/test_claim_race.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: D1 revision ledger shipped: recordVerify (pass+fail) and blockCell append {n,at,claim_session,claimed_at,worker,verdict,failure_signature,note} to append-only trace.attempts; failure_signature via worker --signature or normalizeFailureSignature(output) (exported); trace stays frozen wholesale at updateCell (F1, no hint-map edit needed). +9 new tests (8 lib, 1 CLI); freeze-first + deliberate-red both recorded; mirror/render/manifest regenerated in-cell.
trace.verify_output: test_claim_race: PASS (a/b/c scenarios). test_lib.mjs: 373 passed, 0 failed (was 365 before scl-1; +8 new ledger/normalizer tests). test_bee_cli.mjs: 189 passed, 0 failed (was 188 before scl-1; +1 CLI --signature test). test_lib_mirror.mjs: green (templates/lib and .bee/bin/lib byte-identical, 22 files; hook inventory byte-identical, 10 files). release_manifest --check: 366 file(s) match stored manifest.
